title: Internship full cycle — Employer → College → Student → Employer
oneLiner: End-to-end guided test: partnership setup, employer publish, college visibility, student apply, employer shortlist & select. One session marker (GT-…) links every step.

steps.label: Landing page ready
steps.observe: Home page is open. Full cycle starts with employer sign-in (automatic).

steps.label: Log in as employer (TechCorp)
steps.observe: Employer dashboard loads. Password Admin@123 via guided sign-in.

steps.label: Open campus tie-up directory
steps.observe: Colleges list — IIT Madras should be Approved (or request tie-up if needed).

steps.label: Request tie-up with IIT Madras (if not already Approved)
steps.observe: Toast confirms request, or row already shows Approved.

steps.label: Log in as college admin (IIT Madras)
steps.observe: College hub loads — approve partnership if employer just requested tie-up.

steps.label: Open Employer Partnership Requests
steps.observe: Pending list shows TechCorp Solutions (if request was sent).

steps.label: Approve TechCorp partnership request
steps.observe: TechCorp row approved or already absent from pending list.

steps.label: Log in as employer again
steps.observe: Back on employer hub — ready to publish internship.

steps.label: Navigate to Internship Programs
steps.observe: Internship Programs list or empty state.

steps.label: Scan internship list and status filter
steps.observe: Note draft / published / closed postings.

steps.label: Click Post Internship to open the create form
steps.observe: Post New Internship form with campus checkboxes.

steps.label: Review target campuses (pre-selected)
steps.observe: At least one approved campus checkbox is checked.

steps.label: Type internship title (includes session marker GT-…)
steps.observe: Title shows {{marker}} Summer Data Intern — use this marker in later steps.

steps.label: Set internship start date
steps.observe: Start date shows 01 Jun 2026.

steps.label: Set internship end date
steps.observe: End date shows 31 Aug 2026 (~3 months).

steps.label: Type stipend minimum (INR/month)
steps.observe: Stipend min field shows 25000.

steps.label: Type stipend maximum (INR/month)
steps.observe: Stipend max field shows 35000.

steps.label: Type number of openings
steps.observe: Openings field shows 3.

steps.label: Type minimum CGPA
steps.observe: Min CGPA field shows 7.5.

steps.label: Type eligible branches
steps.observe: Eligible branches shows All (every branch).

steps.label: Type batch year (2026 — matches seeded students)
steps.observe: Batch year field shows 2026.

steps.label: Type skills / keywords
steps.observe: Skills: Python, SQL, Data Analysis.

steps.label: Type additional notes
steps.observe: Notes include guided test marker.

steps.label: Review complete form before publish
steps.observe: All fields populated; campuses selected.

steps.label: Click Publish Internship
steps.observe: Success toast; new row in list with GT- title; status Published.

steps.label: Confirm posting in published list
steps.observe: Employer publish complete — handoff to College next.

steps.label: Log in as college admin
steps.observe: Verify employer posting is visible to campus.

steps.label: Open college Internships list
steps.observe: Published listings from partner employers. New postings show Campus = Pending review until approved.

steps.label: Search for the guided internship by marker
steps.observe: Table filters to {{marker}} in the title column.

steps.label: Filter campus status to Pending review
steps.observe: Only listings awaiting college approval remain visible.

steps.label: Approve guided internship for campus
steps.observe: Row with {{marker}} — click Approve (skipped if already Approved from a prior run).

steps.label: Confirm campus status is Approved
steps.observe: Filter Campus status → Approved; {{marker}} row shows Approved badge. Students can now browse it.

steps.label: Open college Applications (monitor pipeline)
steps.observe: Campus application list — student row appears after student applies.

steps.label: Log in as student (Arjun Verma)
steps.observe: Student dashboard — profile must have a primary CV to apply.

steps.label: Open Browse Internships
steps.observe: Internships visible to IIT Madras including GT- posting.

steps.label: Search for the guided internship by marker
steps.observe: Table filters to {{marker}} in role/title.

steps.label: Click Apply on the guided internship row
steps.observe: Success toast; status Applied. Student step done — handoff to Employer.

steps.label: Confirm application status on list
steps.observe: Row shows Applied (not Open).

steps.label: Log in as employer
steps.observe: Review and advance the student application.

steps.label: Open Applications — Internships tab
steps.observe: Program applications table; Internships tab active.

steps.label: Search applicants by guided internship marker
steps.observe: Arjun Verma row for GT- internship opening.

action.placeholder: Search by name, email, college, or opening

steps.label: Shortlist the applicant
steps.observe: Status Applied → Shortlisted.

steps.label: Select the shortlisted candidate
steps.observe: Status becomes Selected — employer cycle complete.

steps.label: Filter list to Selected and confirm pipeline
steps.observe: Applicant shows Selected badge. Full E2E cycle complete.

steps.label: Log in as student — verify Selected status
steps.observe: My Applications → Internships shows Selected for {{marker}} posting.

steps.label: Open My Applications — Internships
steps.observe: Student sees Selected — internship full cycle verified end-to-end.
